hero_subtitle: SFTY gives compliance leadership a structured and audit-ready record of case decisions connecting provider data, regulatory rules, and internal reviews across digital asset workflows.
trust_card_1_value: Identity checks connected to onboarding decisions
trust_card_2_value: Corporate verification, UBO review and entity risk
trust_card_3_value: Wallet and transaction monitoring in one workflow
trust_card_4_value: Message routing, completeness checks and exception handling
trust_card_5_value: Regulatory changes mapped to internal rule
trust_card_6_value: Decision logs and evidence for every review
problem_title: Compliance case history lacks defensible traceability
problem_description: Executives and compliance leaders struggle with incomplete and fragmented case records that hinder clear audit trails. This gap slows down regulatory reviews and weakens the ability to support defensible compliance decisions during inspections.
problem_point_1_value: KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule outputs sit in separate tools
problem_point_2_value: Teams move data between dashboards, spreadsheets and internal notes
problem_point_3_value: Regulatory changes are hard to map into internal workflows
problem_point_4_value: Evidence and decision history are difficult to reconstruct later
solution_description: SFTY organizes provider outputs, reviewer actions, decision logs and audit evidence into one secure workflow that supports clear, defensible compliance case history for executive review and regulatory inspection.
workflow_title: From case creation to audit evidence
workflow_description: SFTY preserves comprehensive case histories by linking provider outputs, decisions, review notes and evidence to support defensible compliance inspections.
workflow_step_1_description: KYC, KYB, KYT and screening outputs enter SFTY
workflow_step_2_description: Risk rules route checks into the right workflow
workflow_step_3_description: A case opens with customer, wallet and provider context
workflow_step_4_description: Teams review, decide and record the outcome
workflow_step_5_description: Logs, decisions and reports stay ready for audit
why_sfty_title: Not another process. The audit-ready layer
why_sfty_description: SFTY turns fragmented provider outputs into structured case history, preserving decisions and evidence to support defensible compliance review and clear executive risk visibility.
why_sfty_card_1_description: Work above existing KYC, KYB, KYT and Travel Rule tools
why_sfty_card_2_description: Turn disconnected outputs into structured reviews and cases
why_sfty_card_3_description: Preserve evidence, reviewer actions and decision history
why_sfty_card_4_description: Give compliance, risk and leadership one operating view
authority_description: SFTY provides VASPs with a controlled compliance layer that preserves defensible case history, supports bank due diligence and integrates provider outputs for enterprise-grade oversight.
authority_card_1_description: Connect KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into one workflow
authority_card_2_description: Preserve provider outputs, reviewer notes, decisions and supporting records
authority_card_3_description: Prepare clearer compliance evidence for banks, partners and external review
authority_card_4_description: Support private environments, permissions, integrations and internal governance
ask_sfty_placeholder: How can SFTY preserve compliance case history for review
ask_sfty_chip_1_message: Explain how case workflows maintain audit-ready decision logs
ask_sfty_chip_2_message: Show how evidence packages support defensible regulatory reviews
ask_sfty_chip_3_message: Describe how SFTY delivers enterprise visibility for risk control
ask_sfty_helper_text: AI assistant for product, deployment and compliance questions
faq_description: Clear answers on provider orchestration, Travel Rule workflows, audit evidence and enterprise compliance operations.
faq_1_question: What is SFTY for VASP executives?
faq_1_answer: SFTY provides VASP executives with a connected compliance control layer that improves risk visibility, streamlines decision traceability and strengthens audit-ready workflows across digital asset compliance operations.
faq_2_question: How does SFTY preserve case history?
faq_2_answer: SFTY preserves structured case history, decision logs and evidence packages to support defensible compliance reviews and regulatory inspections with clear traceability between actions and supporting data.
faq_3_question: Can SFTY connect existing compliance providers?
faq_3_answer: SFTY connects outputs from KYC, KYB, KYT, Travel Rule and screening providers into integrated workflows without requiring replacement of existing tools or vendor relationships.
faq_4_question: How does deployment support audit readiness?
faq_4_answer: SFTY supports controlled deployment with role-based access, audit logs and configurable governance that help strengthen security and streamline audit and inspection readiness.
faq_5_question: Does SFTY replace our existing providers?
faq_5_answer: No. SFTY sits above your current providers, turning their outputs into structured cases, decisions and reports rather than replacing underlying compliance tools.
final_title: Preserve audit-ready case history with SFTY
final_description: Review how SFTY supports defensible compliance records, decision traceability and structured workflows for executive risk control.
footer_description: Supervisory and compliance control layer for digital asset markets, businesses and regulated institutions.
